session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the full results. I need to know if the prettier failures are pre-existing or new. Report every check's pass/fail status and the exact prettier error output.
session.assistant: I'll run the fast-ci target from the repository root and report the full results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target and report all check results

session.assistant:
Perfect! Here are the complete fast-ci results:
## Fast CI Results - ALL PASSED
**Status: All checks passed - NO failures**
### Check-by-Check Results:
| Check | Status | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | **Lint (ruff)** | ✅ PASS | All checks passed! | | **Format Check (ruff format)** | ✅ PASS | 1,727 files already formatted | | **Prettier Check** | ✅ PASS | All matched files use Prettier code style! | | **Markdown Check** | ✅ PASS | No issues reported | | **Exec Reference Check** | ✅ PASS | .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date | | **Type Check (ty)** | ✅ PASS | All checks passed! | | **Unit Tests (erk)** | ✅ PASS | 6,011 passed in 14.64s | | **Unit Tests (erk-dev)** | ✅ PASS | 136 passed in 5.96s | | **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)** | ✅ PASS | 115 passed in 0.79s | | **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)** | ✅ PASS | 28 passed | | **AGENTS.md Standard** | ✅ PASS | All CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md files properly paired |
### Key Finding: **The prettier failures are NOT pre-existing.** The current branch passes all checks including the prettier check with the message: ``` All matched files use Prettier code style! ```
There are zero formatting violations in the codebase right now.
